description: Elegant White marble is a bright, pure blend of whites and silvery grays. Use this marble to create luxurious and sophisticated countertops and backsplashes.

description: MSI's Portinari Marble slabs make the most stunning marble countertops with a grey background and dramatic black and brown veining throughout.

name: Super White Marble
description: Super White marble's dramatic white and gray veins create a sophisticated look. Use for countertops, islands, backsplashes, and accent walls.
